children.name: hwNatAlgDns
children.description: Whether the DNS NAT ALG is enabled.

children.name: hwNatPortMapRtspPort
children.description: Port number for Rtsp port-mapping .

children.name: hwNatAddrPoolNumOfEntries
children.description:
This object maintains a count of the number of entries 
                that currently exist in the hwNatAddrPoolTable.

children.name: hwNatInterfaceStatsTable
children.description:
This table augments the hwNatInterfaceTable and provides
                statistics information pertaining to the specified
                interface.

children.name: hwNATSessionCntTable
children.description: A table for showing nat session table number.

children.name: hwNatExtIfTable
children.description:
This table holds information about  the currently
  active interfaces.

children.name: hwNatAddrBindNumberOfEntries
children.description:
This object maintains a count of the number of entries
                that currently exist in the hwNatAddrBindTable.

children.name: hwNatAddrPortBindTable
children.description:
This table holds information about the currently
                active NAPT BINDs.

children.name: hwNatServerTable
children.description: Table of NAT server instances.

children.name: hwNatServerNumOfEntries
children.description:
This object maintains a count of the number of entries 
                that currently exist in the hwNatServerTable.

children.name: hwNatStaticTable
children.description: Table of static NAT instances.

children.name: hwNatStaticEntry
children.description: An entry in the table, containing information about a static NAT.

children.name: hwNatStaticVpnName
children.description: VPN instance name of the static NAT.

children.name: hwNatStaticNumOfEntries
children.description:
This object maintains a count of the number of entries 
                that currently exist in the hwNatStaticTable.

children.name: hwNatMapTable
children.description: Table of static NAT instances.

children.name: hwNatRtspAgingTime
children.description: Aging time for Rtsp stream.

children.name: hwNatSipAgingTime
children.description: Aging time for Sip stream.

children.name: hwNatSipMediaAgingTime
children.description: Aging time for Sip media stream.

children.name: hwNatRtspMediaAgingTime
children.description: Aging time for Rtsp media stream.

children.name: hwNatOverlapMapTable
children.description:
Table of instances of overlap NAT that mapping between 
                an overlapped address pool and a temporary address pool.

children.name: hwNatDnsMapNumOfEntries
children.description:
This object maintains a count of the number of entries 
                that currently exist in the hwNatDnsMapTable.

children.name: hwNatDnsMapTable
children.description: Table of instances of DNS mapping.

children.name: hwNatOutboundNumOfEntries
children.description:
This object maintains a count of the number of entries 
                that currently exist in the hwNatOutboundTable.

children.name: hwNatOutboundTable
children.description: Table of outbound NAT instances.

children.name: hwNatOutboundEntry
children.description:
An entry in the table, containing information about 
                a outbound NAT.

children.name: hwNatOutboundAclNum
children.description: Basic or advanced ACL that is in use.

children.name: hwNatOutboundInterface
children.description: IfIndex of the interface that configured with the outbound NAT.
